title: Reported speech with tense shift
subtitle: Report speech more accurately.
overview: B2 reporting often shifts tense and perspective.
Focus on useful patterns, not every transformation.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: He said that he was tired.
He/she asked me if I could help him/her.
Comentó que ya lo había hecho.
He/she commented that he/she had already done it.

items.es: Ana dijo que no podía venir porque estaba enferma.
items.en: Ana said that she could not come because she was sick.

items.es: El profesor explicó que el examen sería más práctico.
items.en: The teacher explained that the exam would be more practical.

items.es: Me preguntaron si había recibido el mensaje.
items.en: They asked me if I had received the message.

items.es: Comentó que ya había hablado con el director.
items.en: He/she commented that he/she had already spoken with the director.

items.es: Respondí que necesitaba pensarlo un poco más.
items.en: I answered that I needed to think about it a little more.
